hero.title: Nurses
hero.reason: In honor of National Nurses Day, we recognize the hard work and dedication of nurses everywhere with this film that showcases their tireless efforts and compassion.
hero.blurb: This comedy-drama film highlights the lives of nurses and the challenges they face, making for a heartwarming and entertaining watch. With a talented cast, it's a great way to spend an evening.

released.title: Shrek the Third
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this animated comedy still delights audiences with its witty humor and lovable characters, making it a great choice for a fun movie night.
released.blurb: The third installment in the Shrek franchise brings back our favorite ogre and his friends for another hilarious adventure. With its clever writing and talented voice cast, it's a must-see for both kids and adults.

birthday.title: Austin Powers: International Man of Mystery
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Mike Myers, born May 15, 1963, starring in this film that showcases his comedic genius and launched the iconic Austin Powers franchise.
birthday.blurb: This spy spoof film is a masterclass in comedy, with Myers' hilarious performance as the titular character. With its witty one-liners and outrageous humor, it's a classic that never gets old.

awful.title: I Know Who Killed Me
awful.reason: This psychological thriller is infamous for its convoluted plot and poor acting, making it a prime example of a dumpster dive movie that's so bad it's good.
awful.blurb: With a messy storyline and cringe-worthy performances, this film is a trainwreck that's hard to look away from. If you're in the mood for something truly terrible, this might be the movie for you.
